stemHtml: A mountain range runs from North to South, and is located to the west of the destination aerodrome. The wind is 270°/30 kt, the air is unstable and rain is falling on the windward side of the mountains from a cloud with a base at 2000 ft. Which of the following can the pilot expect at the destination?

options.a: Dry and warm wind with a cloud base below 2000 ft wind.
options.b: Dry and warm wind with a cloud base above 2000 ft wind.
options.c: Wet and cold wind with heavy precipitation and hail.
options.d: Wet and cold wind with no clouds.
